mapper.sql: select relation.id, relation.user_id, user.username, relation.role_id, role.role_name, relation.created_at from sys_user_role relation inner join sys_user user on user.id = relation.user_id inner join sys_role role on role.id = relation.role_id
mapper.select: select id, user_id, role_id, created_at from sys_user_role where id = #{id}
select role_id from sys_user_role where user_id = #{userId} order by role_id
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user_role (user_id, role_id, created_at) values (#{userId}, #{roleId}, now())

insert into sys_user_role (user_id, role_id, created_at) values
(#{userId}, #{roleId}, now())
mapper.update: update sys_user_role set user_id = #{userId}, role_id = #{roleId} where id = #{id}
